active_goal: Improve MemoryOS Lite v3 into a benchmark-usable Letta-style agent memory system for LongMemEval and LoCoMo, without demo-only phase completion, without hiding case-level regressions, and without enabling the v3 kernel by default.

context_bundle.summary: Phase 13 should implement a source-backed core memory lifecycle: recall/archive evidence -> candidate -> conflict check -> approval/provenance gate -> core update -> history -> rendered block.

objective: Make core memory updates source-backed, conflict-aware, history-preserving, and renderable through the real v3 path without changing defaults.

real_chain_components.store: core block candidate, approval, update, deprecation, and history
real_chain_components.retrieval: candidate promotion inputs and conflict checks
real_chain_components.context_composer: approved core block rendering and token accounting
real_chain_components.answer_projection: verify only if core items enter public answer evidence
real_chain_components.kernel_loop: opt-in only if memory tools are exercised
real_chain_components.public_eval: structural smoke or 30-case gate only if default v3 public context changes

scope: v3 rendering and token accounting if affected
failing_tests_required_before_implementa: repeated recall or archival evidence proposes a source-backed core promotion candidate
conflicting candidate does not overwrite an existing core block silently
approved replacement records old value, new value, source refs, approval/provenance, and history
read-only core blocks reject mutation on every write path
stale core facts can be deprecated without deletion from history
v3 context renders only approved/source-backed core memory, not unapproved candidates
benchmark_or_smoke_commands: MEMORYOS_MEMORY_ARCH=v3 uv run memoryos eval public --benchmark locomo --data-path benchmarks/locomo/locomo10.json --baseline memoryos_lite --limit 5 --no-llm-answer --no-llm-judge # only if default v3 public context changes
Run LongMemEval 30 and LoCoMo 30 full-chain LLM judge in parallel only if Phase 13 changes alter default public benchmark context composition.
usable_ack_checklist: ack_level is usable and active goal is quoted
context bundle was used by plan, execute, and review
RED tests were added before production fixes
approved core updates preserve source refs and history
direct manual or sourceless mutation cannot bypass provenance
rendered core memory is budget-accounted and traceable when applicable
Phase 11 LoCoMo debt is still visible and not hidden
v1 fallback, v3 default, and kernel opt-in remain unchanged
review_focus: demo-only candidate objects without approved commit path
silent overwrite or source-less stable facts
token-accounting regressions in core layer rendering
LoCoMo debt hidden by aggregate or structural-only success
